Fields.Name: Activate Chr by Time - Phantom ID
Fields.Description: Phantom shader ID used for directing the appearance and disappearance of enemies placed in a specific time zone

Fields.Name: Find Unfavourable Failed Point Distance
Fields.Description: Distance to generate an interrupt, which turns out that the enemy is likely to be cut off when going to the end of the path

Fields.Name: Find Unfavourable Failed Point Height
Fields.Description: The height that causes an interrupt, which turns out that the enemy is likely to be cut off when going to the end of the path

Fields.Name: Zone 1 Base Aggro
Fields.Description: Initial aggro value assigned to targets within Distance Threshold 1.

Fields.Name: Zone 2 Base Aggro
Fields.Description: Initial aggro value assigned to targets within Distance Threshold 2.

Fields.Name: Zone 3 Base Aggro
Fields.Description: Initial aggro value assigned to targets within Distance Threshold 3.

Fields.Name: Zone 4 Base Aggro
Fields.Description: Initial aggro value assigned to targets within Distance Threshold 4.

Fields.Name: Distance Threshold 1
Fields.Description: Distance threshold separating Zone 1 and Zone 2.

Fields.Name: Distance Threshold 2
Fields.Description: Distance threshold separating Zone 2 and Zone 3.

Fields.Name: Distance Threshold 3
Fields.Description: Distance threshold separating Zone 3 and Zone 4.

Fields.Name: DMG Level 0 Aggro
Fields.Description: Aggro generated when damage is classified as Level 0: No Impact.

Fields.Name: DMG Level 1 Aggro
Fields.Description: Aggro generated when damage is classified as Level 1: Small Impact.

Fields.Name: DMG Level 2 Aggro
Fields.Description: Aggro generated when damage is classified as Level 2: Medium Impact.

Fields.Name: DMG Level 3 Aggro
Fields.Description: Aggro generated when damage is classified as Level 3: Large Impact.

Fields.Name: DMG Level 4 Aggro
Fields.Description: Aggro generated when damage is classified as Level 4: Medium Blow.

Fields.Name: DMG Level 5 Aggro
Fields.Description: Aggro generated when damage is classified as Level 5: Push.

Fields.Name: DMG Level 6 Aggro
Fields.Description: Aggro generated when damage is classified as Level 6: Strike.

Fields.Name: DMG Level 7 Aggro
Fields.Description: Aggro generated when damage is classified as Level 7: Small Blow.

Fields.Name: DMG Level 8 Aggro
Fields.Description: Aggro generated when damage is classified as Level 8: Minimal.

Fields.Name: DMG Level 9 Aggro
Fields.Description: Aggro generated when damage is classified as Level 9: Uppercut.

Fields.Name: DMG Level 10 Aggro
Fields.Description: Aggro generated when damage is classified as Level 10: Blow Backward.

Fields.Name: DMG Level 11 Aggro
Fields.Description: Aggro generated when damage is classified as Level 11: Breath.

Fields.Name: Off-Target Multiplier 1
Fields.Description: Attack aggro multiplier applied after Off-Target Time Point 1 is reached.

Fields.Name: Off-Target Multiplier 2
Fields.Description: Attack aggro multiplier applied after Off-Target Time Point 2 is reached.

Fields.Name: Off-Target Multiplier 3
Fields.Description: Attack aggro multiplier applied after Off-Target Time Point 3 is reached.

Fields.Name: Off-Target Time Point 1
Fields.Description: First elapsed time point after the off-target aggro timer begins.

Fields.Name: Off-Target Time Point 2
Fields.Description: Second elapsed time point after the off-target aggro timer begins.

Fields.Name: Off-Target Time Point 3
Fields.Description: Third elapsed time point after the off-target aggro timer begins.

Fields.Name: Aggro Transfer Additional Value
Fields.Description: Additional aggro applied when aggro is transferred to a new target.

Fields.Name: Additional Aggro Duration
Fields.Description: Time window during which aggro transfer additional value is applied.

Fields.Name: Revive Damage Extra Aggro
Fields.Description: Amount of extra aggro generated each interval after player deals Revive Damage.

Fields.Name: Revive Damage Extra Aggro Interval
Fields.Description: Time interval between each extra aggro tick after Revive Damage is triggered.

Fields.Name: Revive Damage Extra Aggro Duration
Fields.Description: Total duration during which periodic extra aggro is generated after player deals Revive Damage.
